name: Winter Cabbage Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Large russet potato, peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a Dutch oven over moderate heat until crisp.
2. Add onion and diced potato; cook and stir until onion softens.
3. Stir in chicken broth, cabbage, carrot, wine, sugar, and caraway seeds.
4. Bring soup to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered until vegetables are tender (30-40 minutes).
5. If desired for smoother soup, blend half the batch and return all to the Dutch oven.
6. Stir in half-and-half; simmer uncovered for about 15 minutes.
7. Stir in dill, hot sauce, salt, and pepper to taste.
